title: ESG Currents: How Climate Data Helps Homeowners Assess Costs
title_cn: ESG 潮流：气候数据如何帮助房主评估成本
summary: As climate change intensifies, physical risks to property are mounting. On this episode of ESG Currents, Bloomberg Intelligence sustainable-finance senior analysts Gail Glazerman and Andy Stevenson speak with Daryl Fairweather, chief economist of Redfin, about how homebuyers are responding to physical risks, the challenges for home affordability — especially insurance costs — and how markets are adapting, including signs of climate migration.

Massacesi joins Bloomberg Intelligence pharmaceuticals analyst Sam Fazeli to discuss Bristol Myers’ push into neuroscience, including Alzheimer’s therapies aimed at tau, a protein tied to brain tangles in the disease. They also explore the company’s oncology pipeline, including PD-L1/VEGF bispecifics, next-generation antibody-drug conjugates and advanc

summary: Russian gasoline prices advanced further, with drivers in the summer vacation season facing headaches after some filling stations across the nation limited sales due to Ukrainian attacks on refineries.

title_cn: Citadel 证券周五看到“天文数字”的零售流量
summary: Retail investors poured into US stocks at a record pace on the day of SpaceX’s blockbuster initial public offering and are increasingly driving the broader rally in equities, according to Citadel Securities.

summary: Athens International Airport SA and TAP Air Portugal are adding to a record start to the year for borrowing by the aviation sector globally, as the industry looks to navigate the impact of the Middle East war.

title: Corn Ships Cross Hormuz Toward Iran, UAE Ahead of Trump Deal
title_cn: 在特朗普达成协议之前，玉米船穿过霍尔木兹海峡前往伊朗和阿联酋
summary: A fully-loaded corn ship bound for Iran entered the Persian Gulf after crossing the US blockade line outside the Strait of Hormuz, ahead of the US-Iran interim peace deal aimed at reopening the waterway.

title: SpaceX Shares Fall for First Time Since Blockbuster Debut
title_cn: SpaceX 股价自重磅上市以来首次下跌
summary: SpaceX shares declined for the first time since its record initial public offering, snapping a three-day rally that vaulted it past Amazon.com Inc. as the world’s fifth-largest stock.

title: US Oil Stockpiles Fall to Critical Lows as War Spurs Exports
title_cn: 由于战争刺激出口，美国石油库存跌至临界低点
summary: Inventories at the US’s largest commercial crude oil storage hub fell to the lowest since 2014, as surging exports during the Iran war drain supplies in America.

title: Copper Miner Antofagasta Seeks to Link Ore Sales to Spot Market
title_cn: 铜矿商安托法加斯塔寻求将矿石销售与现货市场联系起来
summary: Chile’s Antofagasta Plc has approached Chinese copper smelters with a proposal to price contractual sales of copper ore using spot-market indexes, a fresh sign that a decades-old system based on fixed-price deals is under strain.

title: Dark Oil Tanker Transits Keep Oil Flowing Through Hormuz Ahead of Peace Deal
title_cn: 在和平协议达成之前，黑暗的油轮运输使石油继续流经霍尔木兹
summary: Tankers crossing the Strait of Hormuz with signals turned off are keeping this month’s oil flows at more robust levels than earlier in the Middle East conflict, as shippers await the signing of a US-Iran peace deal this week.

title: Mutares Is Said to Mull Sale or IPO of Portuguese Firm Efacec
title_cn: 据称 Mutares 正在考虑出售或首次公开募股葡萄牙公司 Efacec
summary: Mutares SE & Co. is exploring options for Portuguese engineering group Efacec, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Europe Has 'Lost Many Races,' Says AMI Labs CEO
title_cn: AMI 实验室首席执行官表示，欧洲“输掉了很多比赛”
summary: Europe has fallen behind on text-based AI - known as LLMs, according to AMI Labs CEO Alex LeBrun. He spoke to Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie at Vivatech 2026 in Paris, France. LeBrun says it could still pull ahead in the race for world models - another evolution in AI that moves away from text-based models, towards spatial and physical intelligence. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe Has Means To Be Self-Sufficient, Says AMI Labs CEO
title_cn: AMI Labs 首席执行官表示，欧洲有办法实现自给自足
summary: Europe has the means to pull ahead in the global AI race by investing in and building more data centres, AMI Labs CEO Alex LeBrun told BTV's Tom Mackenzie at Vivatech 2026 in Paris, France. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Industry Makes Tentative Moves Ahead of Deal to Open Hormuz
title_cn: 石油工业在开放霍尔木兹海峡的交易之前采取了试探性行动
summary: The oil and shipping industry remains largely in wait-and-see mode ahead of Friday’s deadline to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, although there are some tentative signs of preparations as a handful of ships begin rerouting toward the Middle East while Iranian tankers laden with oil move out.

title: Starmer’s Hot Mic Moment Scoops UK-India Trade Announcement
title_cn: Starmer 的热门麦克风时刻报道了英国-印度贸易公告
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer and his Indian counterpart Narendra Modi inadvertently revealed their two countries had resolved a trade impasse when they were overheard at the Group of Seven summit saying an agreement had been reached.

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 6/17/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 6 月 17 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Rebounds as Traders Await Signing of US-Iran Deal
title_cn: 交易员等待美伊协议签署，油价反弹
summary: Oil recovered after two days of stark declines, with prices still broadly pressured by a pending US-Iran interim peace deal that could send barrels gushing back onto the market.

title: ASML CEO Warns of Possible Supply Constraints on Musk’s Terafab
title_cn: ASML 首席执行官警告马斯克 Terafab 可能面临供应限制
summary: ASML Holding NV Chief Executive Officer Christophe Fouquet said the chip equipment maker has to make sure it doesn’t experience supply constraints when servicing new projects such as Elon Musk’s Terafab.

title: Billions in SpaceX Trades Jolt ETFs Including Cathie Wood’s ARKK
title_cn: SpaceX 交易了数十亿美元的 Jolt ETF，其中包括 Cathie Wood 的 ARKK
summary: A series of unusual multibillion-dollar flows has rippled through the exchange-traded fund market in the past week, suggesting some major investors used a contentious method to get exposure to the initial public offering of SpaceX. At least one fund manager placed temporary restrictions on its product in a bid to curb the practice.

title: Warsh Faces First Big Test as Fed Chair
title_cn: 沃什作为美联储主席面临首次重大考验
summary:
Federal Reserve policymakers are expected to hold interest rates steady on Wednesday, posing an early test for new chairman Kevin Warsh as rising inflation erodes households’ purchasing power and President Donald Trump continues to press for lower borrowing costs.  
Robert Kaplan, Vice Chairman at Goldman Sachs, discusses what to expect from Kevin Warsh's first meeting as Fed chair and his outlook for markets after the FOMC decision. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bulgaria to Oppose EU Sanctions Against Russian Patriarch Kirill
title_cn: 保加利亚反对欧盟对俄罗斯宗主教基里尔的制裁
summary: Bulgaria’s new government will oppose sanctions against the head of the Russian Orthodox Church included in the latest European Union package of measures targeting Moscow, the country’s foreign minister said.

title: CarMax Falls as Turnaround Fails to Stem Used Vehicle Slide
title_cn: 由于扭亏为盈未能阻止二手车下滑，CarMax 下跌
summary: CarMax Inc.’s shares dropped after same-store sales and used-car profit declined for a fourth straight quarter, raising questions about the durability of its turnaround effort.

title: Obama Seeks to Defend, Define Presidential Legacy With $850 Million Center
title_cn: 奥巴马斥资 8.5 亿美元建设中心，寻求捍卫和定义总统遗产
summary: Barack Obama’s long-awaited presidential center opens this week poised as a monument to contradiction as much as to the former president. Miranda Davis reports from Chicago. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Capital Factory CEO Baer Killed in Private Plane Crash in Texas
title_cn: Capital Factory 首席执行官贝尔在德克萨斯州私人飞机失事中丧生
summary: Joshua Baer, the founder and chief executive officer of the venture capital firm Capital Factory, died Tuesday in a plane crash in South Texas, the Austin American-Statesman reported.

title: Goldman Tops $1 Trillion in M&A Deals, Fastest to Reach the Mark
title_cn: 高盛并购交易额突破 1 万亿美元，创最快纪录
summary:
Goldman Sachs has already advised on more than $1 trillion of mergers and acquisitions so far this year, the fastest any bank has ever reached the milestone. Stephan Feldgoise runs the team and says it's been an intense first half, driven by big deals. He speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest."
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Macron Seeks Way Around Trump’s Ban on Anthropic’s AI Models
title_cn: 马克龙寻求绕过特朗普对 Anthropic 人工智能模型的禁令
summary: French President Emmanuel Macron led talks with Group of Seven leaders and tech executives to explore how to deploy the most advanced artificial intelligence models through so-called trusted partners, after the US blocked foreign nationals from accessing the technology.

title: Gen Z Wants Tech Without AI
title_cn: Z 世代想要没有人工智能的技术
summary: Cyberdecks, iPods and distraction-free devices are finding a new audience. Bloomberg Opinion columnist Catherine Thorbecke explores the growing appeal of anti-AI tech. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BioNTech Investor Förtsch Says Founders’ Spinout Raises Concerns
title_cn: BioNTech 投资者 Förtsch 表示创始人的分拆引发了担忧
summary: German media mogul and investor Bernd Förtsch is calling on BioNTech SE to provide more details on the planned departure of its founders and the transfer of assets to their new venture.

title: France Adopts Law to Ease EDF Grip on Hydropower Market, Spur Investment on New Generation Capacity
title_cn: 法国通过法律放松法国电力公司对水电市场的控制，刺激对新一代发电能力的投资
summary: The French Parliament adopted a bill to loosen Electricite de France SA’s grip on the hydropower market, a move aimed at ending a spat with the European Union and unlocking billions of euros in investment for new generation capacity.

title: VSCO Challenges Adobe With New App and a $500 Plan for Pros
title_cn: VSCO 向 Adob​​e 发起新应用挑战，并为专业人士提供 500 美元计划
summary: VSCO, the photography platform best known for its popular image filters, is introducing a more advanced iOS app and an all-in-one subscription plan, moves that put it in direct competition with Adobe Inc. and other brands offering professional-grade creative software.

title: US Order on Anthropic Models Signals New Era for AI Controls
title_cn: 美国对人择模型的命令标志着人工智能控制的新时代
summary: The confusing matter of Mythos.

title: ASML CEO on AI Demand, Data Centers in Space and Musk's Terafab
title_cn: ASML 首席执行官谈人工智能需求、太空数据中心和马斯克的 Terafab
summary: ASML Holding NV CEO Christophe Fouquet says the demand for AI infrastructure is still "enormous" and discusses the potential for data centers in space. Speaking during an interview on Bloomberg Television, Fouquet also says the company has to make sure it doesn’t experience supply constraints when servicing new projects such as on Elon Musk’s Terafab. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CarMax, JBL Shares Move on Earnings | Stock Movers
title_cn: CarMax 和 JBL 股价上涨 |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- La-Z-Boy (LZB) shares are higher after the home furniture store’s reported adjusted earnings per share for the fourth quarter beat the average analyst estimate.

- CarMax (KMX) shares are moving after it reported net sales & operating revenue for the first quarter that beat the average analyst estimate.

- Jabil Inc. (JBL) shares rose as much as 14%, the most intraday since April 2025, after the manufacturing services firm reported third-quarter revenue that beat the average analyst estimate. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SoftBank Scales Back Latin America Tech Bets as Venture Capital Boom Fades
title_cn: 随着风险投资热潮的消退，软银缩减了对拉丁美洲科技的投资
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. is struggling to find startups in Latin America ready for major investments, underscoring how sharply the tech boom there has cooled since attracting record levels of venture capital only a few years ago.

title: BofA Public Finance Head Sees AI Boosting Underwriting Dominance
title_cn: 美国银行公共财务主管认为人工智能将提升承保主导地位
summary: Matthew McQueen, who oversees Bank of America Corp.’s public finance department, is looking to artificial intelligence to expand the bank’s underwriting business across the country.

title: SpaceX Adds $1 Trillion in Value Since IPO
title_cn: 自 IPO 以来 SpaceX 市值增加 1 万亿美元
summary: SpaceX has rapidly added $1 trillion in market capitalization since its recent public debut, reaching approximately $2.7 trillion and positioning itself as the fifth largest company globally, close to overtaking Microsoft. Mandeep Singh has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman's Kaplan on Fed's Warsh and AI Capex Boom
title_cn: 高盛的卡普兰谈美联储的 Warsh 和人工智能资本支出繁荣
summary: Robert Kaplan, Goldman Sachs vice chair and former Federal Reserve Bank of Dallas president, expects Federal Reserve's Kevin Warsh to adopt a more neutral tone in his first news conference as chair. Speaking on "Bloomberg Open Interest," Kaplan also says he sees an "historic" capital expenditures boom in the US. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic CEO Amodei on Compute Spend, Surpassing OpenAI
title_cn: Anthropic 首席执行官 Amodei 谈计算支出超越 OpenAI
summary: Emily Chang sits down with Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei in a wide-ranging interview discussing his San Francisco roots, the race against OpenAI, the explosion of compute power, the Pentagon standoff and AI’s endgame. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Latest on Allbirds’ Abrupt Pivot to AI: a New Name and CEO
title_cn: Allbirds 突然转向人工智能的最新消息：新名称和首席执行官
summary: Allbirds Inc., the maker of once-viral wool sneakers that suddenly announced a pivot to artificial intelligence earlier this year, has officially renamed itself Smartbird Inc. and is tapping the former leader of a Danish AI infrastructure group as its new chief.

title: Apple Investors Are Tired of AI Promises, Want Tangible Progress
title_cn: 苹果投资者厌倦了人工智能承诺，希望取得切实进展
summary: Apple Inc. investors are losing patience with the company’s talk about becoming a more formidable presence in artificial intelligence and want to start seeing some results.

title: Snubbing Nvidia for Adobe Costs Florida Stock-Picker $50 Billion
title_cn: Adobe 冷落 Nvidia 使佛罗里达选股者损失 500 亿美元
summary: It was 180 degrees off the hot trade on Wall Street.

title: Google’s Gemini-Powered AI Home Speaker Goes on Sale June 25
title_cn: 谷歌 Gemini 驱动的人工智能家庭音箱将于 6 月 25 日上市
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google said that its Google Home Speaker, a $100 device that includes deep integration with the company’s Gemini artificial intelligence platform, will be available starting June 25.

title: The Trump Phone Is More Novelty Than Serious Smartphone Contender
title_cn: 特朗普手机比真正的智能手机竞争者更新颖
summary: The Trump phone is finally here — sort of — and it bears little resemblance to the original pitch.

title: ECB’s Lagarde Warns AI Is Huge Risk for Financial Stability
title_cn: 欧洲央行拉加德警告人工智能对金融稳定构成巨大风险
summary: Artificial intelligence can potentially lead to dangerous financial crises, and the European Central Bank is determined to ensure that doesn’t happen, President Christine Lagarde said.

title: JPMorgan’s David Kelly Says AI Boom Will Refuel Stock Rally
title_cn: 摩根大通的大卫·凯利表示人工智能的繁荣将推动股市上涨
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s asset-management arm is urging investors to stick with stocks and other higher-risk assets in the second half of 2026, arguing that an AI investment boom and resilient consumers should keep the expansion intact despite persistent inflation and a Federal Reserve on hold.

title: Bezos Says New Glenn Explosion Was 'Rough Moment'
title_cn: 贝索斯称新格伦爆炸是“艰难的时刻”
summary: Jeff Bezos, the founder of Amazon.com Inc. and rocket company Blue Origin, says the explosion of its New Glenn rocket "was a rough moment," adding it was "a gut punch" for the whole team involved. The rocket exploded in Florida in May. (Source: VivaTech 2026)

title: China Plans Mechanism to Evaluate AI Impacts on Job Market
title_cn: 中国计划建立人工智能对就业市场影响评估机制
summary: China is planning a mechanism to assess the impact of artificial intelligence on the job market, highlighting Beijing’s growing concerns over disruptions to the livelihood of its citizens from the technology.

title: SpaceX Venture Backers Debate When to Cash Out
title_cn: SpaceX 风险投资者争论何时兑现
summary: Some longtime investors say they’ll hold their ever-more valuable shares

title: An Essential Reading List on the Short and Tumultuous History of Decentralized Finance
title_cn: 关于去中心化金融短暂而动荡的历史的重要阅读清单
summary: Cornell professor Eswar Prasad’s recommendations are anything but academic.

title: Uber to Offer Robotaxis in Houston With Lucid and Nuro, Posing Challenge to Waymo
title_cn: Uber 将在休斯顿推出 Lucid 和 Nuro 机器人出租车，对 Waymo 构成挑战
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. will offer driverless robotaxi rides in Houston in vehicles developed by Lucid Group Inc. and Nuro Inc., setting it up to challenge Waymo in the fourth-largest US city.

title: Blue Origin Says It Will Launch a New Glenn Rocket This Year
title_cn: 蓝色起源表示今年将发射新的格伦火箭
summary: Blue Origin is already rebuilding the Florida launch site where its New Glenn rocket exploded last month, making way for the space company to fly again this year and rejuvenate its ambitions to challenge SpaceX.

title: Trump Restores Pacific Command Name, Raising Strategy Questions
title_cn: 特朗普恢复太平洋司令部名称，引发战略问题
summary: The Pentagon said it’s changing the name of its Indo-Pacific Command back to the US Pacific Command, unwinding a branding change made during President Donald Trump’s first term, a move analysts suggest could reflect a shift in how the US frames its strategy toward Asia.

title: Trump Erases Another $765 Million in Offshore Wind Leases
title_cn: 特朗普又取消了 7.65 亿美元的海上风电租赁
summary: The Trump administration is canceling four offshore wind leases held by power developer Invenergy LLC that total $765 million, the latest move by the White House to block new offshore wind development.

title: Netherlands Pledges $580 Million for Weapons for Ukraine
title_cn: 荷兰承诺向乌克兰提供 5.8 亿美元武器
summary: The Netherlands pledged €500 million ($580 million) in weapons support for Ukraine, Dutch Defense Minister Dilan Yeşilgöz-Zegerius said Wednesday.

title: Healthy Food May Be Exempt in New Ultra-Processed Definition
title_cn: 健康食品可能不受新的超加工定义的影响
summary: The Trump administration is expected to create an exemption in its definition of ultra-processed foods for “healthy” items and for infant formulas, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: US Senate Postpones Spy Chief Hearing as Trump Demands Delay
title_cn: 由于特朗普要求推迟，美国参议院推迟了间谍首席听证会
summary: President Donald Trump forced the Senate to postpone the Wednesday confirmation hearing for Jay Clayton as his next intelligence director amid a wider spat with congressional Republicans over the Iran peace deal and other matters.

title: What We Know About Iran’s Nuclear Program
title_cn: 我们对伊朗核计划的了解
summary: Iran has faced suspicion for decades over its nuclear ambitions and whether it’s developing the capability to build an atomic weapon. While the Islamic Republic has always maintained that its nuclear program is peaceful and for energy purposes, that claim has been met with skepticism by the US and its allies.

title:
AI Bosses Meet G7 Leaders as US Curbs
Unsettle Allies
title_cn:
美国限制人工智能大佬会见七国集团领导人
令盟友不安
summary:
Tech leaders including CEOs of OpenAI and Anthropic joined G7 leaders in France for talks on AI.

It comes as US allies reel from the Trump administration's decision to curb access to Anthropic's most powerful models. Tyler Kendall explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Hails Interim Peace Deal with Iran
title_cn: 美国赞扬与伊朗的临时和平协议
summary:
The Trump administration hailed its interim peace deal with Iran that’s meant to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, even as hawks in the US pointed to the billions of dollars of economic gains set to come Tehran’s way.
Katherine Thompson, Cato Institute Senior Fellow: Defense and Foreign Policy, discusses the US, Iran deal and what to expect as it sets up 60 days of negotiations between the two nations. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Empties Florida’s Alligator Alcatraz as Costs Soared
title_cn: 由于成本飙升，特朗普清空了佛罗里达州的鳄鱼恶魔岛
summary: The US has emptied the immigration detention camp in the Florida Everglades known as Alligator Alcatraz after the state spent hundreds of millions of dollars on the high-profile facility to support President Donald Trump’s mass deportation agenda.

title: French Senators Warn of Wealth ‘Black Box’ in Tax System
title_cn: 法国参议员警告税收系统中的财富“黑匣子”
summary: French senators investigating how the rich minimize tax bills warned of increasing opacity of their assets and called for more reporting by the wealthiest.

title: Wanted: War-Zone Divers to Scrape Barnacles From Ships in Persian Gulf
title_cn: 通缉：战区潜水员从波斯湾的船上刮取藤壶
summary: Demand for ocean divers who specialize in barnacle scraping is soaring as ships stranded in the Persian Gulf for more than three months prepare to disembark.

title: Israel Pushes Back Against US-Iran Pressure to Quit Lebanon
title_cn: 以色列抵制美国和伊朗退出黎巴嫩的压力
summary: Israel rejected a US request to withdraw troops from southern Lebanon, citing the continued presence of the Iran-backed militant group Hezbollah, a dispute that threatens to complicate efforts by Washington and Tehran to secure a broader peace accord.

title: Trump Says India Trade Deal ‘Very Close,’ Hails Modi as ‘Tough’
title_cn: 特朗普称印度贸易协议“非常接近”，称赞莫迪“强硬”
summary: US President Donald Trump lauded Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi and said that Washington and New Delhi were “very close” to finalizing a long-awaited trade agreement.

title: What It Would Take for Labour to Replace Keir Starmer
title_cn: 工党需要什么才能取代凯尔·斯塔默
summary: The by-election in Makerfield on Thursday is a critical moment for UK premier Keir Starmer — in which a victory for his Labour rival Andy Burnham is widely expected to lead to an imminent leadership challenge.

title: Trump Will Ask US Companies to Make Missiles in Europe
title_cn: 特朗普将要求美国公司在欧洲制造导弹
summary: President Donald Trump is planning on asking US defense companies to produce weapons under license in Europe and Ukraine, according to officials familiar with the discussions.

title: White House to Woo Wall Street Dealmakers With $400,000 Jobs
title_cn: 白宫将提供 40 万美元的工作岗位来吸引华尔街交易撮合者
summary: The Trump administration wants 400 dealmakers to help the US bolster its national security supply chains — and it’s offering salaries as high as $400,000 a year for Wall Street recruits.

title: World Cup, America 250 Face Unexpected Risk With Spy Law Lapse
title_cn: 世界杯、美国250强队面临间谍法失效的意外风险
summary: A controversial spy powers law has become the latest political casualty of President Donald Trump’s second term, injecting uncertainty into US intelligence gathering in a summer dominated by the World Cup and high-profile events celebrating the country’s 250th anniversary.

title: US Exports to Cuba Jump as Fuel, Cars and Food Get Past Trump’s Blockade
title_cn: 随着燃料、汽车和食品突破特朗普的封锁，美国对古巴的出口猛增
summary: US exports to Cuba have surged dramatically this year as businesses use a trade loophole to get fuel, appliances, furniture, food and vehicles past President Donald Trump’s wall of sanctions.

title: Iraq Takes Steps to Boost Oil Exports When Hormuz Reopens
title_cn: 霍尔木兹重新开放时伊拉克采取措施增加石油出口
summary: Iraq is preparing to boost oil exports from its southern ports with a formal deal to open the Strait of Hormuz scheduled to be signed on Friday.

title: Halkbank Iran Sanctions Case Ends as Judge Grants DOJ Motion
title_cn: Halkbank 伊朗制裁案结束，法官批准司法部动议
summary: A federal judge allowed the Justice Department to formally drop a long-running criminal case against Turkish state-owned lender Turkiye Halk Bankasi AS for allegedly helping Iran move billions of dollars in violation of US sanctions.

title: Germany Refuses Total’s Request to Return Offshore-Wind Leases
title_cn: 德国拒绝道达尔归还海上风电租赁的请求
summary: Germany said it’s not willing to let TotalEnergies SE walk away from expensive offshore-wind projects despite rising costs and delays.

title: Starmer Faces Cabinet Showdown in Days After Crucial By-Election
title_cn: 关键补选后几天，斯塔默面临内阁摊牌
summary: Supporters of Greater Manchester Mayor Andy Burnham expect senior members of Keir Starmer’s cabinet to tell the UK prime minister to agree a handover of power in the coming days, in an attempt to make it impossible for him to continue in post.

title: FBI Says Drone Plot at White House Foiled by Mom’s Call
title_cn: 联邦调查局称白宫无人机阴谋被妈妈的电话挫败
summary: Tycen Proper’s parents got worried after their 19-year-old son started communicating with “random” people online. They called law enforcement after he spent $3,000 of his graduation money on ballistic armor plates, a new shotgun and “lots” of ammunition, according to authorities.

title: US Hails Deal That Defers War Goals and Gives Iran Relief
title_cn: 美国赞扬推迟战争目标并给予伊朗救济的协议
summary: The Trump administration hailed its interim peace deal with Iran that’s meant to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, even as hawks in the US pointed to the billions of dollars of economic gains set to come Tehran’s way.

title: UK Hands Out Largest Ever Fine for Russian Sanctions Breach
title_cn: 英国因俄罗斯违反制裁行为开出有史以来最大的罚款
summary: The UK fined a unit of Sabre Corp. more than £1 million ($1.3 million) for breaching sanctions, the largest penalty leveled since sanctions were introduced following Russia’s invasion of Ukraine in 2022.
